upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yatra sarvata ApaH praDvaMseran' (ASva॰gf॰4.1.10) praDvaMseran=syanderan=nAvatizWeran praSabdo gatyarTasya dyotakaH atrArTe prapUrva evAyaM DAtuH prayogamavataran dfzwaH praDvaMsate=praRaSyati (CAM॰u॰8.1.4)
'praDvastA vA taruByaH sarasaPalaBfto valkalinyaSca SaNKAH' (Bartf॰3.26) praDvastAH=nazwAH=ucCinnAH
'praDvastacatvarapaTA'yoDyA' (goresiyosampA॰rA॰2.68.53) ujjAsitAjiramArgA praDvastAni catvarARi panTAnaSca yasyAM sA praDvastAni vigatajanasampAtAnItyarTaH
'vAtapraviDvastataraNgasaNkulo yaTArRavaH' (hari॰2.124.55) vAtena vAtyayA praviDvastA vikziptAstaraNgA vIcayaH pravI viSezaRe vAtapravfdDastu taraNgasaNkula iti pAWAntaram
'apaDvastA dasyuBUtA Bavanti ye brAhmaRAn kzatriyAH santyajanti' (BA॰SAM॰73.10)
'apaDvaMsajAH smftAH' (manu॰10.40) saNkIrRayonaya ityuktaM Bavati atra pitaramapekzya mAtA prakfzwavarRatarA Bavati
'DvAntaM tamo'vadaDvase hate' (vftre) (f0 101137) avadaDvase=avastAdagacCat cUrREravaDvaMsayati avacUrRayati avaDvaMsayati=avakirati
'yaH paruzaH pAruzeyo'vaDvaMsa ivAruRaH' (aTarva0 5223) avaDvaMso rajaScUrRaM vA kvacidavaDvaMsaH parityAgamAha tatrAvo DvaMsasyAsAkalyamAha
'yaTA SmaSAnamftvA lozwo viDvaMsetEvaM hEva viDvaMsamAnA vizvaYco vineSuH' (Sa0 brA0 14418) rajaHkaRA ivotpatanta ityAha
'etacCrutvA tu BIzmasya rAjYAM viDvaMsire tadA kAYcanANgadinaH pInA BujAScandanarUzitAH' (BA0 u0 16927).. vidaDvaMsire iti tUcitam taTA daDvaMsira iti kvacitpAWaH
'BUmO bARErviniDvastAM patitAM jyAmivAyuDAt' (goresiyo saM0 rA0 212513) viniDvastAm avasrastAm vyAyatapAtaM patitAm
'sanAmAnA cid Dvasayo nyasmA avAhannindra uzaso yaTAnaH' (f0 10736) nyaDvasayaH=nyaDvaMsayaH
'brAhmaRasya gavAM rAjan hriyatInAM rajaH purA somamudDvaMsayAmAsa…' (BA0 anu0 1014).. udDvaMsayAmAsa vyApa saMvavAra
'putrADiBiraBiDvastAm' (BA0 u0 9090) manaH pIqArajovakIrRAm ityAha aBiplutAmiti pAWAntaram
'samudDataniDAnAni pariDvastAjirARi ca' (veSmAni) (rA0 23318) pariDvastAni mArjanAdirahitAnyajirARi catvarARi yezu tAni saMskftaSArmaRyakozastu pariDvastAnyutsannAnItyAha
'aTa reRupariDvastaM samutTApya narADipam' (rA0 28210) pAMsuBirAvftam rajomalinam DUliDUsaritam samudDvastamiti pAWAntaram
'indrasya rUpaM samfdDyE sAvitramupaDvastam' (tE0 saM0 2163) upaDvasto viBinnavarRaH bahubinducitaSarIra iti BawwaBAskaraH
